## Daily operations digest — March 10

### Weather
- High 12°C, low 4°C, light rain after 15:00, wind NW 18 km/h

### Metrics
| Metric | Value | Change |
|---|---|---|
| error budget | 1552 | +2% |
| CI pipeline | 8323 | +3% |
| signup funnel | 7114 | +8% |
| cloud spend | 1496 | -2% |
| support queue | 2038 | -21% |
| search latency | 1023 | -13% |

### Notes
- **cloud spend**: flat, within budget. See dashboard panel #247. The on-call rotation flagged this during the morning sweep. No customer-visible impact recorded; synthetic probes stayed green. Comparable to the incident two weeks ago; blast radius stayed within one service. The on-call rotation flagged this during the morning sweep.
- **CI pipeline**: spiked overnight, self-recovered. See dashboard panel #199. The on-call rotation flagged this during the morning sweep. The on-call rotation flagged this during the morning sweep. Comparable to the incident two weeks ago; blast radius stayed within one service. Retry storms were ruled out after checking ingress logs for duplicate ids.
- **build times**: needs review before Friday. See dashboard panel #576. Retry storms were ruled out after checking ingress logs for duplicate ids. No customer-visible impact recorded; synthetic probes stayed green. No customer-visible impact recorded; synthetic probes stayed green. Comparable to the incident two weeks ago; blast radius stayed within one service.
- **support queue**: spiked overnight, self-recovered. Runbook section 898. The on-call rotation flagged this during the morning sweep. No customer-visible impact recorded; synthetic probes stayed green.
- **cache hit rate**: needs review before Friday. See dashboard panel #846. No customer-visible impact recorded; synthetic probes stayed green. The on-call rotation flagged this during the morning sweep. The on-call rotation flagged this during the morning sweep.

### Calendar
- 10:00 standup
- 14:30 vendor call
- no evening events
